Q5 Not checked
Technical • ELECTRONICS ENGINEERING • +1 / -0.33
Not attempted

For DC supply, a uncharged inductor, will act as a

Correct answer: A
Solution

(a)
For DC source,
An uncharged inductor will act as open circuit element whereas, a fully charged inductor will act as short circuit.

Q8 Not checked

A series R-L circuit has R = 10 Ω and L = 10 Henry. Assume the inductor to be initially uncharged. A d.c. voltage of 50 V is applied at t = 0. The voltage across inductor (L) at t = 2 sec is ________ V. (rounded off to two decimal places)

NAT
Correct answer: 6.77
Solution

6.77 (6.75 - 6.78)
